Description: Option set: clm_eventaction. Values: Discovered, ReminderSent, Claimed, Reassigned, Snoozed, Renewed, Suppressed, EscalatedToManager, MarkedOrphaned.
Systemuser who performed the action. Null for system-initiated events.
Yes when the action was performed by a cloud flow.
Which bucket triggered the event. Option set: clm_reminderbucket.
Serialized snapshot of relevant data at event time.
